case_title: CAMPBELL, MARJORIE VS FOX, GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, GEORGE
CASE CONTINUED TO SEPT 6, 1996, 10;00 AM DEPT M30. M30 IS LOCATED AT 850 BRYANT ST. SAN FRANCISCO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY CAMPBELL, MARJORIE AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, GEORGE PACIFIC BOOK AUCTION GALLER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, MARJORIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FOX, GEORGE PACIFIC BOOK AUCTION GALLER THE TWO VOLUMES IN QUESTION WERE PRODUCED IN COURT BY DEFT GEORGE FOX. PLFT ACCEPTED THE VOLUMES AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-29-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-06-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SUBPENA DUCES TECUM AS TO GEORGE FOX & PACIFIC BOO K AUCTION POS FILED.
